message:
feat(refinery): auto-close completed convoys after merge (gt-sszx3)

Wire postMergeConvoyCheck into the refinery merge flow to automatically
close convoys when all tracked issues are resolved. Sends completion
notifications, triggers swarm landing for integration branches, and
prunes stale remote refs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
